DreamStudio

Stability AI's official web interface for Stable Diffusion

6/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$10 creditsStarting Price
2022Founded
Free Plan Available

About DreamStudio

DreamStudio is a ai image generation platform founded in 2022. It positions itself as “Stability AI's official web interface for Stable Diffusion” and is best suited for Stable Diffusion users, professional workflows, API access, developers. Pricing starts at $10 credits, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To ImageYes
Image To ImageYes
InpaintingYes
OutpaintingYes
UpscalingYes
Style TransferYes
Batch GenerationYes
Api AccessYes
Commercial LicenseYes
Custom ModelsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Official Stable Diffusion interface
  • Pay-per-use pricing is flexible
  • Full API access for developers

Cons

  • Credits run out quickly with high-res images
  • Interface is basic compared to alternatives
  • Future uncertain after Stability AI restructuring
